title: Crispy Mediterranean Tofu Stir-fry
description: A fresh, energizing dish that blends crispy tofu with Mediterranean veggies in a savory soy sauce glaze. Dairyfree and packed with protein and flavor.
instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture, then cut it into 1‑inch cubes and pat dry.
Whisk soy sauce with lemon juice & zest; set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat. Add tofu and cook until golden on all sides, about 5‑6 minutes. Remove tofu and set aside.
In the same skillet, add minced garlic and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add diced bell pepper and zucchini; cook for 3‑4 minutes until they start to soften.
Stir in cherry tomatoes, spinach, olives, oregano, and red pepper flakes; cook for 2‑3 minutes until the spinach wilts.
Return tofu to the skillet, pour the soy‑lemon mixture over everything, and toss to coat. Cook for an additional 1‑2 minutes until heated through.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon.
